top_signals.title: "Ukraine has become a net security provider for Europe": President von der Leyen unveils new defence partnership with Kyiv
top_signals.summary:
European Commission News Brussels, 17 Jul 2026 
President Ursula von der Leyen travelled to Kyiv on 15 July for her eleventh wartime visit to Ukraine, where she was awarded the inaugural Order of Europe, a n...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Apple Tops Nvidia as World’s Largest Company Amid Tech Rotation
top_signals.summary: Apple Inc. is again the biggest company in the world after wresting the title from Nvidia Corp., which has held it since May 2025.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Chips Stocks Tumble Into Bear Market as 105% AI Rally Fizzles
top_signals.summary: A closely-watched index of semiconductor stocks has fallen into a bear market, unwinding a chunk of the blistering memory-led rally that saw the gauge more than double in just three months.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Dairy company Fairlife suspends production in US after cyber incident
top_signals.summary: Fairlife’s U.S. operation includes plants in Michigan, New York and Arizona, and the company's retail sales passed $1 billion in 2022.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
